name: Kobold Burrow
description: A network of small, meticulously engineered tunnels opens into a surprisingly organized underground chamber. Tiny alcoves line the walls, each containing bedding or supplies. The kobolds here are crafty trapmakers who have turned their home into a lethal maze for the unwary.

setting_data.atmosphere: The tunnels are claustrophobically small for medium creatures. Trip wires glint in the torchlight and the walls are scarred with pick marks. Somewhere ahead, high-pitched voices argue over the placement of a spring-loaded spike trap.

npcs.name: Tikka the Trapmaster
npcs.description: A kobold wearing oversized goggles and a bandolier of small mechanical devices. One hand is stained with alchemical reagents.
npcs.backstory: Tikka is the genius behind the burrow defenses and fiercely proud of every trap. They see each intruder as a test subject for new designs.

objects.label: Tripwire Trap
objects.description: Nearly invisible wire stretched across the passage at shin height, connected to a falling-rock mechanism.

objects.label: Supply Alcove
objects.description: A neatly organized niche in the wall containing dried meat, small tools, and crossbow bolts.

objects.label: Mining Cart
objects.description: A small cart on rails, sized for kobolds, filled with chunks of ore and loose stones.

objects.label: Concealed Pit
objects.description: A section of floor covered with a thin cloth and dust, concealing a shallow pit lined with sharpened stakes.
